ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., Unknown, 0-18, 19-30) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Female, Male, Unknown) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Test result of the patient (e.g., Positive, Negative, Unknown) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_test_result FOREIGN KEY ("test_result") REFERENCES test_results ("test_result_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Unknown, 0-18) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the age group */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the age group (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Female, Male, Unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_result_name" TEXT /* Name of the test result (e.g., Positive, Negative, Unknown) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test conducted (e.g., PCR, rapid antigen) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., New York, Los Angeles) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location (e.g., Northeast, Southwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "infectious_period" TEXT /* Typical infectious period of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease causing the outbreak */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the outbreak occurred */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the outbreak */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the outbreak */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in the outbreak */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths associated with the outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date of the case */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient was hospitalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
